title: ability to sort items on mobile app
excerpt: We can sort lists on the desktop version which works well but not on the mobile app. 90% of our team is on site, meaning they cannot see the list in the order that is viewed on desktop. Working on a construction site, it…

posts.author: jamesshepherd50 (james shepherd)
posts.cookedHtml: We can sort lists on the desktop version which works well but not on the mobile app. 90% of our team is on site, meaning they cannot see the list in the order that is viewed on desktop. Working on a construction site, it is hard for the site team to whip out a laptop to see what task needs to be completed next. therefore adding the sort function to the mobile app is critical for this program to work for our needs.

posts.author: wenzday (wenzday)
posts.cookedHtml: Same. Using this app in the field. Need sort feature for mobile app.
